title: FOUNDERS DAY IN EMBU
content: Today being the 15th March, we hhave arranged the founders day in Embu to commemorate it in a special way

title: SRM BUZZ Launch
content: Today ytwas a nice day as we are launching the SRM BUZZ today, it will be spearheaded by Prof Jose and the MC will be MC Billionaire from Embu, hopefully the day will be as nice as possible and it will go well
